Description: Главный epic проекта: образовательная платформа по кибербезопасности для СНГ/Казахстана.
Регистрация, вход, роли и профиль пользователя.
Каталог курсов, уроки, задания, прогресс.
Очки, рейтинг, статусы прохождения.
CRUD для курсов, модулей и заданий.
Русский интерфейс, KZ/CIS контекст, учебные задания.

Summary: Set up repository and project structure
Description: Создать проект, настроить scripts, env example, README, базовую структуру frontend/backend.
Описать User, Course, Module, Lesson, Challenge, Submission, Progress.

Summary: As a visitor, I can register an account
Description: Acceptance: email/password validation; password hash; duplicate email handled.

Summary: As a user, I can log in and log out
Description: Acceptance: valid credentials create session; logout clears session; invalid credentials show Russian error.

Summary: As a user, I can view my profile
Description: Acceptance: profile shows name, email, points, completed challenges, active courses.

Summary: As a learner, I can browse courses
Description: Acceptance: course cards show title, track, difficulty, progress; filters work.

Summary: As a learner, I can open a course page
Description: Acceptance: modules and lessons shown in order; locked/unlocked state is clear.

Summary: As a learner, I can read a lesson
Description: Acceptance: theory markdown renders; next challenge link visible.

Summary: As a learner, I can submit a flag
Description: Acceptance: correct flag awards points once; wrong flag does not award points.
Compare submitted value with server-side hash; never expose valid flags in client bundle.

Summary: As a learner, I can see course progress
Description: Acceptance: progress percent changes after completed tasks.

Summary: As a learner, I can see leaderboard
Description: Acceptance: users sorted by points; current user visible.

Summary: As an admin, I can create and edit courses
Description: Acceptance: admin-only form creates course with title, track, difficulty, description.

Summary: As an admin, I can create challenges
Description: Acceptance: admin can add description, hint, points and flag; flag stored as hash.
Create 3 tracks and 10-15 starter tasks with safe educational content.
Navigation, forms, errors and empty states are in Russian.
Use local examples: universities, SOC roles, KZ timezone, regional terminology.
README explains setup; demo script describes 5-minute walkthrough.
Test registration -> course -> lesson -> flag -> progress -> leaderboard.
